settings.title: Settings
settings.key_desc: Generate a free key at Google AI Studio (aistudio.google.com/apikey). After entering, press Save and optionally Test. The key is stored only on this PC (userData/settings.json) and is never uploaded.
settings.key_from_env: Currently loaded from a .env file. Saving here will override it.
settings.license_desc: Enter the license key you received after purchase.

history.title: Meeting history
history.pick: Pick a meeting from the list on the left.

overlay_picker.hint: Drag to box the counterparty's screen-share area (Esc to cancel).

legal.commerce: Notation based on Specified Commercial Transactions Act
